subject: Project pulse: falcon execution in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-1985
body: Following yesterday's call, the falcon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso. Reference initiative INIT-1985. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
